ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ ١
ayahs.translation: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتْ ٢
ayahs.translation: And when the stars fall, dispersing,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ ٣
ayahs.translation: And when the mountains are removed

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتْ ٤
ayahs.translation: And when full-term she-camels are neglected

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتْ ٥
ayahs.translation: And when the wild beasts are gathered

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ ٦
ayahs.translation: And when the seas are filled with flame

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ ٧
ayahs.translation: And when the souls are paired

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْمَوْءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتْ ٨
ayahs.translation: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بِأَىِّ ذَنۢبٍ قُتِلَتْ ٩
ayahs.translation: For what sin she was killed

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتْ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And when the pages are spread [i.e., made public]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتْ ١١
ayahs.translation: And when the sky is stripped away

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ ١٢
ayahs.translation: And when Hellfire is set ablaze

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ ١٣
ayahs.translation: And when Paradise is brought near,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ ١٤
ayahs.translation: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ ١٥
ayahs.translation: So I swear by the retreating stars -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ ١٦
ayahs.translation: Those that run [their courses] and disappear [i.e., set]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: And by the night as it closes in

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ ١٨
ayahs.translation: And by the dawn when it breathes [i.e., stirs]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ ١٩
ayahs.translation: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger [i.e., Gabriel]

ayahs.textUthmani: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: ذِىۡ قُوَّةٍ عِنۡدَ ذِى الۡعَرۡشِ مَكِيۡنٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ ٢١
ayahs.translation: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: And your companion [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ) ] is not [at all] mad.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: And he has already seen him [i.e., Gabriel] in the clear horizon.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: And he [i.e., Muḥammad (ﷺ)] is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: And it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: So where are you going?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا تَشَآءُوۡنَ اِلَّاۤ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And you do not will except that Allāh wills - Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa tashaaa'oona illaaa ai yashaaa-'al laahu Rabbul 'Aalameen
